description: The two message-delete routes — role: viewer/owner. DELETE /v1/messages/:id (one id) and DELETE /v1/messages (clear all), the split successors to the old POST /v2/messages/delete {ids:[...]} / {all:true} body form (v1-architecture.md §2.3, §3). Both are idempotent.

delete_one_by_id.note: Deleting an already-gone id returns the same 200 {ok:true} — idempotent by construction (v1-architecture.md §6).

clear_all.note: No path id = clear the whole (bounded, 200-row) message history. Clearing an already-empty history is also 200 {ok:true}.
